name: Lester Allen
abstract: Lester M. Allen (November 17, 1891 – November 6, 1949) was an American actor, dancer, singer, comedian, and circus performer.

concerts.label: Benefit: Jewish Community Center of Saranac Lake

about_quotes.speaker: George "Jug" Jernberg
about_quotes.evidence: And little Lester Allen, that comedian that was with White Scandals, he was there.
